summary: First end-to-end test of GearMind. 21/21 backend pytest cases passed (health, JWT auth incl. 401 paths, vehicles CRUD with user-scoping, AI chat single + multi-turn, parts search with eBay->AI fallback returning 8 sorted results, history save/list user-scoped). Frontend e2e on 390x844 mobile viewport: splash -> auth -> login -> home dashboard -> add vehicle (Honda Civic 2020) -> diagnose chat with Claude reply -> parts search 'brake pads' returns 8 results sorted ascending with BEST PRICE badge on first -> save shopping list -> history shows saved items -> tab navigation across Home/Diagnose/Parts/History/Profile all working. No pageerrors, no red screen.

issues: Non-blocking console warnings from RN Web: shadow*, textShadow*, props.pointerEvents are deprecated. Cosmetic only - consider migrating to boxShadow / style.pointerEvents to silence warnings in the future.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single-file (~475 lines) - still under 700 line threshold, but if more features are added split into routers (auth, vehicles, ai, parts, history).

eBay scrape returns 403 from container IP (expected per agent_to_agent_context_note). AI catalog fallback is correctly firing and returning realistic brand-name parts with deep-link to eBay search. This is documented MOCKED behavior.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded everywhere via projection {'_id': 0}.
JWT auth is solid: bearer header parsed, 401 on missing/invalid token verified.
All env vars (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, JWT_SECRET, EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL) consumed from env - no hardcoding.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed users, vehicles, diagnoses, and shopping lists. The seeded demo@gearmind.com / Test1234 user works as documented. Frontend e2e added a Honda Civic 2020 vehicle to the demo user account and saved a 'brake pads' shopping list, both visible in history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_gearmind_api.py covers all endpoints incl. multi-turn Claude context. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Parts search ALWAYS falls back to AI catalog (eBay 403 from container) - expected. Frontend uses expo-router file-based routing under app/(tabs)/; tab labels are uppercase ('HOME','DIAGNOSE','PARTS','HISTORY','PROFILE') so use page.get_by_text('PARTS', exact=True) to navigate. All interactive elements have testID -> data-testid. Mobile viewport: 390x844.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found in this iteration.
